concerns.text: FR-006 (Mixed-Effects Model) and US-3 (Mixed-Effects Model) are missing a task that implements the Plan's mandatory fallback to Fixed-Effects ANOVA. Task T024 implements the Mixed-Effects Model but lacks the abort logic or model-switching logic required by Plan.md (Phase 3) when N<=3 datasets are available.

FR-007 and SC-001 require a sensitivity analysis sweeping 'Silhouette thresholds {0.4, 0.5, 0.6}'. Task T027.5 implements this, but Plan.md explicitly replaces this with a 'Leiden-resolution sweep (0.1 -> 1.0)'. There is no task implementing the Plan's required Leiden-resolution sweep, leaving the execution strategy unimplemented.

FR-002 and FR-003 require computing geometric diagnostics on the 'sampled high-dimensional space'. Task T007 computes geometry but the description is ambiguous ('relative to embeddings') and lacks explicit logic for the 'random pair sampling' or 'sampling strategy' mandated by Plan.md (Phase 1, Step 4) to ensure construct validity.

FR-001 requires dynamic HVG selection (elbow point). Task T013 hardcodes 'top 2000' genes. There is no task implementing the dynamic variance-stabilizing selection method described in Plan.md (Phase 1, Step 6).

Plan.md Phase 0 requires an abort condition if NO raw counts are found for ANY dataset. Task T041 implements an abort if raw counts are not found for ANY of the three, but there is no task explicitly handling the 'Case-Study' mode (single dataset) fallback described in Plan.md Phase 0.3 if only one dataset is found.
Task T029 references 'FR-010' in its description, but the spec only defines FR-001 through FR-008. This is a stale/phantom tag.
